ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the property */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" REAL /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "sqft_living" INTEGER /* Square footage of living space */,
  "sqft_lot" INTEGER /* Square footage of the lot */,
  "floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the property */,
  "waterfront" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a waterfront (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "view" INTEGER /* Indicates the view score of the property */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* Condition of the property */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade of the property */,
  "sqft_above" INTEGER /* Square footage of the living space above ground */,
  "yr_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "yr_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "sqft_living15" INTEGER /* Square footage of living space in the 15 nearest neighbors */,
  "sqft_lot15" INTEGER /* Square footage of the lot in the 15 nearest neighbors */,
  "property_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the property */,
  "tax_assessment_value" INTEGER /* Tax assessment value of the property */,
  "annual_property_tax" INTEGER /* Annual property tax */,
  "hoa_fees" INTEGER /* Homeowners' association fees */,
  "yearly_energy_cost" INTEGER /* Estimated yearly energy cost */,
  "sustainability_rating" INTEGER /* Sustainability rating of the property */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last property inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled property inspection */,
  "heating_type" TEXT /* Type of heating system */,
  "cooling_type" TEXT /* Type of cooling system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "min_price" INTEGER /* Minimum price for properties of this type */,
  "max_price" INTEGER /* Maximum price for properties of this type */,
  "average_price" INTEGER /* Average price for properties of this type */,
  "average_sqft" INTEGER /* Average square footage for properties of this type */,
  "average_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Average number of bedrooms for properties of this type */,
  "average_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Average number of bathrooms for properties of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, lease) */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Sale price of the property */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent handling the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was closed */,
  "offer_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the initial offer */,
  "final_sale_price" INTEGER /* Final sale price after negotiations */,
  "commission_percentage" REAL /* Commission percentage for the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the agent works at */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the agent */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total sales volume in dollars */,
  "total_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions handled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the office */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the office is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the office is located */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the office */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of office (e.g., corporate, branch) */,
  "total_agents" INTEGER /* Total number of agents in the office */,
  "annual_revenue" INTEGER /* Annual revenue of the office */,
  "office_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_office_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_manager_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renovations" (
  "renovation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renovation */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being renovated */,
  "renovation_date" TEXT /* Date of the renovation */,
  "renovation_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the renovation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the renovation */,
  "renovation_status" TEXT /* Status of the renovation (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of completion */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual date of completion */,
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contractor handling the renovation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renovation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renovations_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_category" TEXT /* Category of the feature (e.g., structural, aesthetic) */,
  "feature_status" TEXT /* Status of the feature (e.g., good, needs repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., interior, exterior) */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., price change, status update) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "change_source" TEXT /* Source of the change (e.g., user input, automated system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, manager, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address for contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "valuation_date" TEXT /* Date of the valuation */,
  "estimated_value" INTEGER /* Estimated value of the property */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for valuation (e.g., appraisal, market analysis) */,
  "valuation_method_details" TEXT /* Details of the valuation method */,
  "valuation_source" TEXT /* Source of the valuation (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_values_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., title deed, inspection report) */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created or last updated */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., valid, expired) */,
  "document_author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_documents_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
